title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal claims it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster than baseline. This represents a use case of AI-assisted software development amplifying enterprise delivery velocity.
